title: GEEZY Set of 4 Classic Glasses 300mL – Tall Transparent Drinking Tumblers for Gin, Spirits, Vodka, Water or Cocktail – Stylish Glassware Gift for Men – Durable, Dishwasher Safe Barware Set
features: ELEGANT DESIGN: Experience sophistication with this set of 4 260ML whisky glasses. The intricate pattern adds a touch of class, perfect for serving whiskey, gin, or your favorite cocktail.
SUPERIOR DRINKING EXPERIENCE: Enjoy enhanced taste with glasses designed to prevent spilling. The thick sides and solid base maintain your drink's ideal temperature, making each sip delightful.
DURABLE AND CONVENIENT: Crafted from high-quality glass, these drinking tumblers are built to last. Dishwasher-safe for easy cleaning, they’re perfect for both daily use and special occasions.
IDEAL GIFT CHOICE: Impress loved ones with these stylish drinking glasses. Perfect for birthdays, weddings, or Father’s Day, they make an exquisite gift for anyone who appreciates fine glassware.

SPECIFICATIONS: Item Dimensions: Width: 7 cm, Depth: 7 cm, Height: 13 cm / Package Dimensions: Height: 14.5 cm, Width: 14.5 cm, Depth: 14.5 cm / Package Weight: 1370 g / Material: Glass / Color: Transparent / Capacity: 300mL
description: Product Description Set of 4 260ML Whisky Drinking Glasses Indulge in the world of fine spirits with our Modern Whiskey Glass Set. Crafted with precision and elegance, this set of 4 whiskey glasses is designed to elevate your drinking experience to new heights. BRILLIANT CRYSTAL DESIGN These modern whiskey glass set feature an elegant design that will impress when serving scotch, rum, whiskey, and more. The set includes 4 whiskey glasses and the unique crystal pattern adds a touch of elegance to the pure and transparent glass. BETTER DRINKING EXPERIENCE The whiskey glasses feature a comfortable cylindrical shape for easy handling and are designed to prevent rocking and spilling. They have a thick side and a solid round base, highlighting the crystal texture, and keep your drink at the perfect temperature for a superior drinking experience. DURABLE AND EASY TO CLEAN These glasses are crafted from premium-quality materials, ensuring their longevity and durability, making them last for a longer period. These versatile glasses are perfect for everyday use, and they are dishwasher-safe and easy to clean. PERFECT GIFT These elegant whisky glasses are perfect for your dining table or parties, impressing guests with their exquisite design. They also serve as ideal gifts for fathers, husbands, and brothers, making them suitable for a range of occasions, from birthdays to weddings, and highlighting your impeccable taste.
